## Summary

Describe the problem and the approach taken.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Chore

## Validation

List the commands you ran.

```bash
# Example
cd frontend && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run build
cd backend && go fmt ./... && go vet ./... && go build ./...
```

## Screenshots or Recordings

Include before and after screenshots for UI changes when relevant.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused.
- [ ] I updated docs when needed.
- [ ] I did not add secrets or environment-specific values.
- [ ] I stayed within the active development surface or got maintainer approval.
- [ ] I completed the relevant local validation steps.

## Notes for Reviewers

Call out tradeoffs, follow-up work, or areas where you want specific feedback.
